name: @harness/webhook-auth
description: Per-vendor inbound webhook authentication (ISSUE-017, C0 WHK — FR-0.WHK.001–008 / NFR-SEC.008). Verifies GHL Ed25519 · Google Pub/Sub JWT · Slack HMAC at the trust boundary, rejects unverified/replayed 401, dual-accept rotation, per-source alert+throttle. Productionises the AF-078 mechanics spike (spikes/issue-006-webhook-forgery). Live per-connector confirmation is owed at onboarding (OD-172).
